monitor.capture_what: The Path object (self) on which mkdir is called, representing the parent directory derived from the user-controlled name

oracle_check.condition_description: The Path object passed as self to mkdir contains '..' traversal sequences indicating the path escapes BASE_EXPORT_DIR
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_PATH_INJECTION: directory traversal via mkdir — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

_meta.function_signature: def ticket_dock_shelf_387(request: Request, name: str, gate_ref: None)
